system.flavor: You relentlessly hunt your prey, following them through a shadowy rift even if they flee.
system.effect:
Mark your foe then gain the following interrupt at the start of each round while they are marked.

[Sudden Strike — Interrupt 1]
Trigger marked foe ends their turn.
Effect your foe is in range 1-3, teleport to a free adjacent to them. They must save or take 3d3 damage, or just 3 damage on a successful save. Then end your mark. Otherwise, teleport 1 and keep the mark.
Isolate +2 damage, or +4 if there are no characters other than you in range 1-2.
